BridalClass2-1ED_31.english: Surprisingly, even Hachiko of Castling ate the meat pie that was baked for him quite well, didn't he?
BridalClass2-1ED_31.korean: 의외로 하치코가 구워준 미트파이도 잘 먹어주던걸?

BridalClass2-1ED_32.english:
I could never do that...  
Someday, Hachiko of Castling will bake pies all week long... It really brings tears to my eyes…
BridalClass2-1ED_32.korean:
난 절대로 그렇게 못 해…
언젠가 일주일 내내 하치코가 파이를 구워 오는데… 정말 눈물이 핑 돌더라…

BridalClass2-1ED_34.english: Although I took charge of guiding Miss Hachiko of Castling's cooking... I told her to get her taste evaluations from my older sister.
BridalClass2-1ED_34.korean:
소첩이 하치코 양의 요리 지도를 도맡아 하였지만…
맛 평가는 언니에게 받으라 말했사옵니다.

BridalClass2-1MD_9.english: In all my life, I never thought that I would fight under the protection of Lady Black Lilith.
BridalClass2-1MD_9.korean: 살다 살다, 소첩... 리리스 양의 엄호를 받으며 싸우게 될 줄은 몰랐사옵니다.

BridalClass2-1OP_12.english: I am sorry… but it seems that this is as far as I can go. Miss Scissors Lise, please do not worry and go ahead.
BridalClass2-1OP_12.korean:
분하지만… 소첩은 여기까지인 듯하옵니다.
리제 양께선 개의치 마시고 어서 가시옵소서.

BridalClass2-1OP_15.english: It seems that Miss Scissors Lise is also very tired, so it would be best to hurry.
BridalClass2-1OP_15.korean: 리제 양께서도 많이 지치신 듯하오니, 서두르시는 편이 좋겠사옵니다.

BridalClass2-1OP_21.english:
"Warning, challenger Only Scissors Lise, Head Chef's Monologue.  
Life gauge is at 1.  
If hit one more time, you will be eliminated."
BridalClass2-1OP_21.korean:
《경고, 도전자 오직 리제만 님, 주방장의 혼잣말 님. 
라이프 게이지가 1 남았습니다.
한 번 더 피격 시 탈락 처리 됩니다.》

BridalClass2-1OP_39.english: Sowan, shouldn't you try doing something, just like the way you taught Scissors Lise and me those clever cooking tricks?
BridalClass2-1OP_39.korean: 소완, 네가 나랑 리제한테 잔꾀 요리를 가르쳐 줬던 것처럼 뭐라도 해봐야지 않겠어?

BridalClass2-2ED_105.english: "...I’m not really sure why I ended up playing Black Lilith’s daily daughter."
BridalClass2-2ED_105.korean:
…왜 제가 리리스 씨의 일일 딸 
역할을 맡게 됐는진 잘 모르겠네요.

BridalClass2-2ED_106.english: Oh, nice to see you, Ms. C-33 Andvari. How has the supply management work been lately?
BridalClass2-2ED_106.korean: 어머, 반가워요 안드바리 양. 요새 보급 관리 업무는 어때요?

BridalClass2-2ED_107.english: Lately, T-13 Alvis and LRL haven't been trespassing in the warehouse, so I have a lot less to worry about.
BridalClass2-2ED_107.korean:
최근 들어 알비스 언니랑 LRL이 창고를 무단으로 
침입하지 않아서 신경 쓸 일이 훨씬 줄어들었어요.

BridalClass2-2ED_110.english: That's a relief, C-33 Andvari. Then since the weather is nice, shall we go out together?
BridalClass2-2ED_110.korean: 다행이네요, 안드바리 양. 그럼 날도 좋은데 같이 놀러나갈까요?

BridalClass2-2ED_111.english: C-33 Andvari! Over here. Shall we try this game machine this time?
BridalClass2-2ED_111.korean: 안드바리 양! 이쪽이에요. 이번엔 저 게임기를 해볼까요?

BridalClass2-2ED_113.english: Ms. C-33 Andvari, you went through the trouble of taking time off to come here... Are you planning to keep staring at the panel? If you keep doing that, I'll feel really hurt too…
BridalClass2-2ED_113.korean:
안드바리 양, 기껏 힘들게 시간 내서 놀러 왔는데... 계속 패널만 쳐다보실 생각이세요?
자꾸 그러면 저도 많이 섭섭한데…

BridalClass2-2ED_115.english: Don't worry, you don't trust CS Perrault?
BridalClass2-2ED_115.korean: 걱정 마세요, 페로를 못 믿는 거예요?

BridalClass2-2ED_116.english:
It's not that I don't trust Black Lilith's sisters...  
but this is the first time she's left the whole warehouse to someone else and gone out for fun.
BridalClass2-2ED_116.korean:
리리스 씨의 자매들을 못 믿는 건 아니지만…
창고를 누군가한테 전부 맡기고 놀러 나온 건 이번이 처음이란 말이에요.

BridalClass2-2ED_117.english: Besides… if the T-8W Valkyrie sisters see me wearing this outfit… I feel like I’d look like a spoiled little kid…
BridalClass2-2ED_117.korean:
게다가… 이 옷을 입고 있는 모습을 발키리 언니들이 보기라도 한다면...
응석 부리는 어린애처럼 보일 것 같아서…

BridalClass2-2ED_118.english: Isn't it natural for a girl like C-33 Andvari at that age to throw tantrums?
BridalClass2-2ED_118.korean: 원래 안드바리 양 나이 때면 응석을 부리는 게 당연하지 않나요?

BridalClass2-2ED_119.english: N-No, I can't be spoiled! I'm going to become a grown-up and cool woman like Captain Leona of Blood and Iron and T-8W Valkyrie unnie!
BridalClass2-2ED_119.korean:
으, 응석은 안 돼요! 레오나 대장님과 발키리 언니처럼 
어른스럽고 멋진 여자가 될 거란 말이에요!

BridalClass2-2ED_127.english: I didn't know you were so good at drawing, C-33 Andvari... Could I possibly see some of your other drawings as well?
BridalClass2-2ED_127.korean: 이렇게 그림을 잘 그리시는 줄 몰랐어요, 안드바리 양… 혹시 다른 그림도 볼 수 있을까요?

BridalClass2-2ED_131.english: R-really? But… so… um… sometime… I drew Captain Leona of Blood and Iron… and she asked if you were T-10 Nymph…
BridalClass2-2ED_131.korean:
지... 진짜요? 하지만… 그러니까… 우으… 언제 한 번…
레오나 대장님을 그렸는데… 대장님께선 님프 언니냐고 물었어서…

BridalClass2-2ED_133.english:
Hehe… From what I see, it looks just like Captain Leona of Blood and Iron.  
Yes! Since it’s come to this, how about formally learning painting from Miss Mery?
BridalClass2-2ED_133.korean:
후후… 제가 보기엔 레오나 대장을 똑 닮은 것 같아요.
그래! 이렇게 된 김에, 메리 양께 정식으로 그림을 배워보는 건 어떠세요?

BridalClass2-2ED_136.english: But Pixie and T-13 Alvis play as hard as they work, don't they? And C-33 Andvari could probably do what she wants just like the older girls, right?
BridalClass2-2ED_136.korean:
그렇지만 픽시 양이랑 알비스 양은 노는 것도 일하는 것만큼 열심히 하잖아요?
안드바리 양도 언니들처럼 하고 싶은 걸 해도 괜찮을 텐데요?

BridalClass2-2ED_142.english: From what Captain Leona of Blood and Iron said, Black Lilith was meticulous about everything…
BridalClass2-2ED_142.korean: 레오나 대장님한테 듣기론 리리스 씨는 매사에 꼼꼼했다고…

BridalClass2-2ED_143.english: Hahaha… Are you embarrassed? Unlike my obsession with humans before the destruction, I tried to hide my feelings to become Master’s own 'good Black Lilith'.
BridalClass2-2ED_143.korean:
하하하… 부끄럽네요? 멸망 전 인간 님들께 집착한 것과 달리
주인님만의 '착한 리리스'가 되기 위해 애써 마음을 숨겼어요.

BridalClass2-2ED_145.english: I want to let Ms. C-33 Andvari know as well.

BridalClass2-2ED_149.english: A painting for C-33 Andvari… a map?

BridalClass2-2ED_153.english: If you look at the paintings that Miss C-33 Andvari has drawn so far, you will surely be surprised by Miss Mery.
BridalClass2-2ED_153.korean: 그간 안드바리 양이 그린 그림을 보면 분명 메리 양도 놀라실 거예요.

BridalClass2-2ED_155.english:
If it’s not too late… I-I still want to seriously learn now!  
Someday, I really want to draw a picture like Captain Leona of Blood and Iron!
BridalClass2-2ED_155.korean:
늦지 않았다면… 지, 지금이라도 진지하게 배워보고 싶어요!
언젠가 레오나 대장님을 닮은 그림을 꼭! 그려보고 싶어요!

BridalClass2-2ED_156.english: You're enjoying yourself much more than when you were at the game hall, aren't you, C-33 Andvari?
BridalClass2-2ED_156.korean: 게임장에 있을 때보다 훨씬 더 즐거워하시는군요, 안드바리 양?

BridalClass2-2ED_157.english: Then shall we go ahead and start the first class? What would be good for a warm-up... Right, how about drawing Ms. Black Lilith today?
BridalClass2-2ED_157.korean:
그럼 이참에 바로 첫 수업을 시작해 볼까요? 몸풀기로 어떤 게 좋을까…
옳지, 오늘은 리리스 씨를 그려보는 건 어떠세요?

BridalClass2-2ED_158.english: Ahaha… bringing in Captain Leona of Blood and Iron, whom Miss C-33 Andvari likes…
BridalClass2-2ED_158.korean: 아하하… 안드바리 양이 좋아하는 레오나 대장을 불러오는 게…

BridalClass2-2ED_159.english: No! Captain Leona of Blood and Iron can draw anytime, and… if it’s drawing for the first class…
BridalClass2-2ED_159.korean:
아니에요! 레오나 대장님은 언제든 그릴 수 있어요, 그리고…
첫 수업으로 그림을 그리는 거라면…

BridalClass2-2ED_160.english: I want to draw Ms. Black Lilith!

BridalClass2-2ED_170.english: The next challenger is the 'Only Scissors Lise' challenger. Hmmm… I am definitely a little more concerned than with the previous two challengers.
BridalClass2-2ED_170.korean:
다음 도전자는 '오직 리제만' 도전자로군요.
흐음… 확실히 앞선 두 도전자 분들보단 조금 걱정되긴 하네요.

BridalClass2-2ED_179.english: I never thought I would become the daily daughter of someone as terrifying as Scissors Lise!!! Hoooeoeoeeng!!!
BridalClass2-2ED_179.korean: 저도 리제 님처럼 무시무시한 분의 일일 딸이 될 줄은 몰랐다고요!!! 후에에에엥!!!

BridalClass2-2ED_44.english: (I also do not easily overlook the mistakes Merope made or the mistakes Rhode made on the battlefield called the sea.)
BridalClass2-2ED_44.korean: (나 또한 바다라는 전장에서 메로페가 잘못했던 일이나, 로데가 잘못했던 일을 쉬이 넘어가지 않는다.)

BridalClass2-2ED_6.english: "Hmph, raising children isn't something you do with an attitude like that, Prototype Labiata. Even a bioroid created in the image of humans has its roots in humans themselves…"
BridalClass2-2ED_6.korean:
흥, 육아는 그런 마음 따위로 하는 게 아니다, 라비아타.
무릇 인간을 본 떠 만든 바이오로이드도 그 뿌리는 인간 그자체…

BridalClass2-2ED_74.english: (It compares to my appearance when I made him clean the deck just because Rhode couldn't handle the Annihilator well.)
BridalClass2-2ED_74.korean: (로데가 어나이얼레이터를 잘 다루지 못한다는 이유로 갑판 청소를 시켰던 내 모습과 비교되는군.)

BridalClass2-2ED_85.english: Th-that's not it! I always teach LRL and T-13 Alvis manners!
BridalClass2-2ED_85.korean: 그, 그건 아니에요! LRL이랑 알비스한테 늘 예의를 가르친다고요!

BridalClass2-3ED_102.english: (Hoo… That Merope. She gave Rhode quite an interesting piece of advice.)
BridalClass2-3ED_102.korean: (호오… 메로페 녀석. 로데한테 제법 재밌는 훈수를 뒀군.)

BridalClass2-3ED_104.english: (I always took Merope and Rhode only to the battlefield, and never once chatted leisurely in a hot bath.)
BridalClass2-3ED_104.korean:
(나는 늘 메로페와 로데를 전장으로만 데리고 갔지,
한가롭게 뜨거운 욕탕 안에서 떠들어 본 적은 없다.)

BridalClass2-3ED_115.english: I'll also wash Scissors Lise's back very cleanly! Hehehe!
BridalClass2-3ED_115.korean: 저도 리제 님 등을 아주 깨끗하게, 박박 씻겨드릴 거예요! 에헤헤!

BridalClass2-3ED_121.english: "...When I was first chosen as Scissors Lise's exam assistant, I was just scared. So... um... Every time she opened her mouth, she would call me a pest..."
BridalClass2-3ED_121.korean:
…처음 리제 님의 시험 도우미로 뽑혔을 땐 무섭기만 했어요. 그러니까… 으음…
입만 열면 해충이라고 하신다던가…

BridalClass2-3ED_144.english: I was sure that if I had a mother I could get along with like Scissors Lise, like a close older sister, I could definitely rely on her more!
BridalClass2-3ED_144.korean: 리제 님처럼 친한 언니같이 지낼 수 있는 어머니라면 분명 더 의지할 수 있을 거라는 확신이 들었어요!

BridalClass2-3ED_155.english: Yes. I am sure that Prototype Labiata, whom we watched together, would have the same opinion as me.
BridalClass2-3ED_155.korean: 그래. 함께 지켜봤던 라비아타도 나와 동일한 의견일 거라 확신한다.

BridalClass2-3ED_34.english: Oh, Scissors Lise unnie? You said you had an exam today and left early, so why are you back already?
BridalClass2-3ED_34.korean: 어라, 리제 언니? 오늘 시험이 있다고 일찍 나가시더니, 왜 벌써 돌아오셨어요?

BridalClass2-3ED_41.english:
Ah... So Scissors Lise unnie had such circumstances.  
It seems that becoming Miss Rhode's temporary parent is part of the evaluation criteria.
BridalClass2-3ED_41.korean:
아… 리제 언니한테 그런 사정이 있으셨던 거로군요.
아무래도 로데 양의 일일 부모가 되는 게 평가항목인가 봐요.

BridalClass2-3ED_44.english: Even if you say that, we can tell that, usually, Scissors Lise unnie doesn't have such thoughts about us.
BridalClass2-3ED_44.korean:
말씀은 그렇게 해도, 평소 리제 언니가 저희들에게 
그런 생각을 하고 계시지 않다는 것쯤 알 수 있는걸요.

BridalClass2-3ED_47.english: (I made up my mind. 'Only Scissors Lise'—let the challenger be eliminated.)
BridalClass2-3ED_47.korean: (마음을 굳혔다. '오직 리제만' 도전자는 탈락 처리하도록 하지.)

BridalClass2-3ED_48.english: ('Only Scissors Lise-man' seems to have a noticeably shallower depth of thought compared to the previous two participants.)
BridalClass2-3ED_48.korean: ('오직 리제만' 도전자는 앞선 두 참가자보다 확실히 생각의 깊이가 얕네요.)

BridalClass2-3ED_51.english: Although Sister Rhea and Sister Daphne took good care of me, Sister Scissors Lise got angry, saying I was pretending to be sick.
BridalClass2-3ED_51.korean:
레아 언니랑 다프네 언니가 잘 돌봐 주셨지만
리제 언니는 꾀병을 부리는 거냐며 화를 내셨죠.

BridalClass2-3ED_55.english: So Rhodeo will surely recognize your sister's warm sincerity.
BridalClass2-3ED_55.korean: 그러니까 로데도 분명 언니의 따스한 진심을 알아줄 거예요.

BridalClass2-3ED_61.english: Unnie, everyone at Fairy is cheering for you, Scissors Lise unnie, fighting!
BridalClass2-3ED_61.korean: 언니, 페어리의 모두가 리제 언니를 응원하고 있어요, 파이팅!

BridalClass2-3ED_68.english: I'm sorry… Again, I'm just being a nuisance to Scissors Lise… Hooeeehh!! Merophe told me never to be a nuisance to anyone…
BridalClass2-3ED_68.korean:
죄송해요… 또, 또 리제 님한테 민폐만… 후에에엥!!
메로페 님께서 절대로 남한테 민폐를 끼치지 말라고 하셨는데…

BridalClass2-3ED_72.english: "Hiiiiii?! W-where… wherreee!! Please save me, I can't die like this…!! I still haven't even tried Lady P-3M Undine's crème brûlée and mille-feuille yet!!!"
BridalClass2-3ED_72.korean:
히이이익?! 어디… 어디이이!! 살려주세요, 전 이대로 죽으면 안 돼요…!!
운디네 님의 크렘 브륄레랑 밀푀유도 아직 못 먹어 봤는데에에에에에!!!

BridalClass2-3ED_96.english: "I heard, I heard that Scissors Lise-nim… spent the night with the commander… Without resting until morning… Hehe… I'm so jealous… Hehe…"
BridalClass2-3ED_96.korean:
드, 듣기론 리제 님… 사령관님이랑 밤을 보낸 적이 있다 들었는데…
아침까지 쉬지도 않고 막… 헤헤… 부럽다아… 헤헤…

BridalClass2-3ED_98.english: Whoa... Graceful! Scissors Lise-sama, your face suddenly turned red... Then it subsides!
BridalClass2-3ED_98.korean: 우… 우아아아앗! 리제 님, 갑자기 얼굴이 빨개지셔서는… 그러다 가라앉아요!

BridalClass2-4ED_10.english: - I nodded with a smile, but Prototype Labiata seemed genuinely disappointed.
BridalClass2-4ED_10.korean: - 내가 웃으며 고개를 끄덕였지만, 라비아타는 못내 아쉬운 눈치이다.

BridalClass2-4ED_17.english: - Prototype Labiata smiled brightly at my request and nodded.
BridalClass2-4ED_17.korean: - 내 부탁에 라비아타는 빙긋 웃으며 고개를 끄덕였다.

BridalClass2-4ED_23.english: - Scissors Lise, Sowan, and Lilith are practically at the center of it.
BridalClass2-4ED_23.korean: - 리제와 소완, 그리고 리리스는 그 중심이나 마찬가지이다.

BridalClass2-4ED_26.english: Above all, Prototype Labiata, you worked hard to create an opportunity where everyone in Orca could grow. I always rely on you a lot.
BridalClass2-4ED_26.korean:
무엇보다도 라비아타, 
오르카의 모두가 발전할 수 있는 기회의 장을 만드느라 고생 많았어. 
항상 라비아타에게 많은 걸 의지하고 있어.

BridalClass2-4ED_31.english: Black Lilith unnie. What have you been doing sitting at the table all day?
BridalClass2-4ED_31.korean: 리리스 언니. 하루 종일 테이블에 앉아서 뭘 하고 계세요?

BridalClass2-4ED_42.english: "President Prototype Labiata said that. Now, you have to become not Orca's bioroid, but a 'true wife' and a 'mother.'"
BridalClass2-4ED_42.korean:
라비아타 통령이 그랬거든. 
이젠 오르카의 바이오로이드가 아닌, '진정한 아내'이자 '어머니'가 되어야 한다고.

BridalClass2-4ED_45.english: Then, CS Perrault… if you weren't the master of [username] right now… what do you think it would have been like if there had been another master?
BridalClass2-4ED_45.korean:
그러면 페로… 넌 혹시 지금의 [username]주인님이 아니었다면…
다른 주인님이 계셨다면 어땠을 거 같아?

BridalClass2-4ED_48.english: "It's not an instinct engraved as a bioroid, but you want to convey the reason you love your master with your own heart, right?"
BridalClass2-4ED_48.korean:
바이오로이드로서 각인된 본능이 아니라, 
스스로의 마음으로 주인님을 사랑하는 이유를 전하고 싶으신 거죠?

BridalClass2-4ED_5.english: - Just then, Prototype Labiata came in with a knock.
BridalClass2-4ED_5.korean: - 때마침 노크 소리와 함께 라비아타가 들어왔다.

BridalClass2-4ED_82.english: Help me… I also want to write a letter that would move Master, just like Scissors Lise!
BridalClass2-4ED_82.korean: 도와줘… 나도 리제 너처럼 주인님이 감동하실 만한… 편지를 쓰고 싶어!

BridalClass2-4ED_9.english: Yeah, of course. If that's how the judges chosen by Prototype Labiata evaluated it, I want to respect that.
BridalClass2-4ED_9.korean: 응, 물론이지. 라비아타가 발탁한 심사위원의 평가가 그렇다면 존중하고 싶어.

BridalClass2-5ED_32.english: "I, your humble wife, did not expect such excessive kindness from Miss Scissors Lise. There usually are no such occasions, but ha... writing a letter that conveys one's feelings is difficult."
BridalClass2-5ED_32.korean:
소첩, 리제 양께 과분한 호의를 바라진 않았사옵니다.
평소엔 이런 일이 없었사온데, 하아… 마음을 담는 편지란 어렵군요.

BridalClass2-5ED_37.english: Isn't Black Lilith usually the captain of the guards who stays by the master's side?
BridalClass2-5ED_37.korean: 리리스 양은 평소 주인의 곁을 보좌하는 경호대장 아니옵니까.

BridalClass2-5ED_38.english: ...And Miss Scissors Lise also shared a lot of communication with her master through written conversations in the exchange diary.
BridalClass2-5ED_38.korean: …그리고 리제 양 또한 교환일기를 통한 필담으로 주인과 많은 교감을 나누었지요.

BridalClass2-5ED_54.english:
"Earlier, the pest also called me 'Scissors Lise'.
Are you going to cry in front of me now?! You guys... Why the hell is that?"
BridalClass2-5ED_54.korean:
아까 해충도 나한테 '리제'라고 부르더니만.
넌 이제 하다 하다 내 앞에서 울기까지 해?! 너희들… 대체 왜 그래?

BridalClass2-5ED_63.english: Aurora and Fotia of Fireside said to tell you that the kitchen is off-limits for the time being. It's perfect for focusing only on the letter.
BridalClass2-5ED_63.korean: 아우로라랑 포티아가 주방은 당분간 출입 금지라고 전해달래. 편지에만 집중하기 딱이네.

BridalClass2-5ED_64.english: You are taking care of me… so thoroughly. The person standing here now, is it not Miss Scissors Lise but Miss Daphne?
BridalClass2-5ED_64.korean: 소첩을… 이렇게나 챙겨주시다니, 지금 서 계신 분이 리제 양이 아니라 다프네 양이신지요?

BridalClass2-5ED_66.english:
“…Did you say that you carried me here yourself? 
I don't think the Miss Scissors Lise I knew is certainly the same person.”
BridalClass2-5ED_66.korean:
…소첩을 직접 업고 여기까지 온 것이라 하셨사옵니까?
소첩이 알던 리제 양은 확실히 아닌 것 같사옵니다.

BridalClass2-5ED_70.english: …I am starving… Would Miss Scissors Lise bring me the hospital meal?
BridalClass2-5ED_70.korean: …소첩, 굶주렸사온데… 리제 양께서 병원식을 가져다주시지 않겠는지요?

BridalClass2-5ED_73.english: Scissors Lise does not have the habit of speaking honestly. However, I think this side of Scissors Lise is her charm.
BridalClass2-5ED_73.korean:
리제 양은 솔직하게 말하는 법이 없사옵니다.
하지만 지금은 이런 모습이 리제 양의 매력이라 생각되옵니다.

BridalClass2-5ED_75.english: As Miss Scissors Lise pointed out, little wife, you were always in the kitchen, so you never had a chance to see the outside scenery.
BridalClass2-5ED_75.korean: 리제 양의 지적대로 소첩, 늘 주방에서 나오질 않으니 바깥 풍경을 볼 일이 없었지요.

BridalClass2-6ED_106.english: "Sowan's sincere story, desperate enough to ask Black Lilith and Scissors Lise for help. The guilt that had built up deep in her heart would have all melted away like snow and become the foundation for the coming spring days."
BridalClass2-6ED_106.korean:
- 리리스와 리제에게 도움을 청할 만큼 간절했을 소완의 진솔한 이야기.
그녀의 가슴 깊이 쌓인 죄책감은 모두 눈 녹듯 사라지고 찾아올 봄날의 밑거름이 되었으리라.

BridalClass2-6ED_108.english: Shall I read Scissors Lise's letter…?

BridalClass2-6ED_115.english:
Even a couple who meet while keeping secrets from each other are that sweet...  
How sweet must the days be raising a child born between Master, who has nothing to hide, and Scissors Lise?
BridalClass2-6ED_115.korean:
서로에게 비밀을 감추고 만난 부부도 저렇게 달콤한데... 
숨길 것 없는 주인님과 리제 사이에서 태어난 아이를 키우는 나날은 얼마나 달콤할까?

BridalClass2-6ED_117.english: Scissors Lise will clean the master's room, Scissors Lise will do the master's laundry, Scissors Lise will prepare the master's dinner, Scissors Lise will greet the master at the entrance, Scissors Lise will relieve the master's daily fatigue on the bed…
BridalClass2-6ED_117.korean: 리제가 주인님의 방을 청소하고, 리제가 주인님의 빨래를 하고, 리제가 주인님의 저녁 식사를 준비하고, 리제가 주인님을 현관에서 맞이하고, 리제가 침대 위에서 하루의 피로를 풀어드리고…

BridalClass2-6ED_122.english: Back when I wore a torn swimsuit in front of my master and got scolded by Audrey Dreamweaver… I disappointed him because I would faint even if just a little of his skin touched me.
BridalClass2-6ED_122.korean:
주인님 앞에서 조각난 수영복을 입고 오드리한테 잔소리를 들을 때만 해도…
주인님의 살이 조금만 닿아도 기절해버리는 탓에 실망시켜드렸지만.

BridalClass2-6ED_124.english: On the day I become my master's wife, I will truly become a mature Scissors Lise and stand by my master's side.
BridalClass2-6ED_124.korean: 주인님의 아내가 되는 그날엔, 정말로 어른스러운 리제가 되어 주인님 옆에 설게요.

BridalClass2-6ED_132.english: The light of Scissors Lise's life, the flame of Scissors Lise's waist. Scissors Lise's sin, Scissors Lise's soul. Masㅡ terㅡ
BridalClass2-6ED_132.korean: 리제의 삶의 빛, 리제의 허리의 불꽃. 리제의 죄, 리제의 영혼. 주ㅡ 인ㅡ 님ㅡ

BridalClass2-6ED_135.english: - Master’s own fiancée, Scissors Lise, reporting.

BridalClass2-6ED_136.english: After reading Scissors Lise's letter all the way through, a smile spread across my lips.
BridalClass2-6ED_136.korean: - 리제의 편지를 다 읽고 나니 입가에 웃음이 번졌다.

BridalClass2-6ED_137.english:
"- From the very day I first met Scissors Lise, the way she bickered with Black Lilith and Sowan...  
The way her face would turn bright red and she couldn't lift her head just from holding hands..."
BridalClass2-6ED_137.korean:
- 처음 리제를 만난 날부터, 리리스, 소완과 아웅다웅하던 모습이…
손을 잡기만 해도 얼굴이 새빨개져 고개를 들지 못하던 모습이…

BridalClass2-6ED_138.english: "- The first time you expressed your feelings for me was clumsy, but I could feel Scissors Lise's grown-up courage to approach me as a proper wife."
BridalClass2-6ED_138.korean:
- 나에 대한 마음을 표현하는 첫 모습은 서툴렀지만,
어느덧 어엿한 아내로서 다가가겠다는 성장한 리제의 용기가 느껴졌다.

BridalClass2-6ED_139.english: And now I opened Black Lilith's letter with the cute little handwriting.
BridalClass2-6ED_139.korean: - 그리고 이제 아기자기한 글씨가 적힌 리리스의 편지를 펼쳤다.

BridalClass2-6ED_141.english: While saying that it is natural for Black Lilith to be in the position of the legitimate wife, protecting the beloved master…
BridalClass2-6ED_141.korean: 사랑하는 주인님을 지키고, 정실의 자리에 리리스가 있는 건 당연하다고 말하면서도…

BridalClass2-6ED_148.english: I would hate it if it were a human other than my master. I want to serve only Master [username], who has been with this Black Lilith, as my husband.
BridalClass2-6ED_148.korean:
주인님이 아닌 다른 인간 님이셨다면 싫어요.
오직 이 리리스와 함께 해오신 [username]주인님만을 남편으로 섬기고 싶어요.

BridalClass2-6ED_149.english: I want to raise a child who resembles both Master and Black Lilith equally and envision the future together.
BridalClass2-6ED_149.korean: 주인님과 리리스를 반씩 닮은 아이를 키우며 미래를 그려나가고 싶답니다.

BridalClass2-6ED_150.english: During this competition, Black Lilith also learned a lot. It's hard to even compare it to her position as the eldest sister of the companions…
BridalClass2-6ED_150.korean:
이번 대회를 하며, 리리스도 많이 배웠어요.
컴패니언의 맏언니라는 위치와는 비교도 하기 힘들 정도로…

BridalClass2-6ED_152.english: That's why I really wanted to pass and prove that I, Black Lilith, am the master's legitimate spouse.
BridalClass2-6ED_152.korean: 그랬기에 꼭, 통과해서 주인님의 정실은 이 리리스라는 걸 증명하고 싶었어요.

BridalClass2-6ED_153.english: I will continue to be a good Black Lilith who strives for my beloved master.
BridalClass2-6ED_153.korean: 사랑하는 주인님을 위해 앞으로도 노력하는, 착한 리리스가 될게요.

BridalClass2-6ED_155.english: …And to Scissors Lise and Sowan, who have helped me reach this point, I will make sure to teach them, as my attendants, the skills to serve the master properly with this opportunity.
BridalClass2-6ED_155.korean:
…그리고, 이 자리까지 도와준 리제와 소완에게도,
저를 보필할 첩실로서, 주인님을 모실 수 있는 소양을 이번 기회에 확실히 가르쳐 주도록 할게요.

BridalClass2-6ED_158.english: - Black Lilith, the perfect legitimate wife only for my master.

BridalClass2-6ED_159.english: After reading the letter that conveyed Black Lilith's feelings, I smiled.
BridalClass2-6ED_159.korean: - 리리스의 마음이 느껴지는 편지를 읽은 후, 미소가 지어졌다.

Even a couple who meet while keeping secrets from each other are that sweet...  
How sweet must the days be raising a child born between Master, who has nothing to hide, and Scissors Lise?

서로에게 비밀을 감추고 만난 부부도 저렇게 달콤한데... 
숨길 것 없는 주인님과 리제 사이에서 태어난 아이를 키우는 나날은 얼마나 달콤할까?

BridalClass2-6ED_174.english: Therefore, with the help of Miss Black Lilith and Miss Scissors Lise, I have reached before the master.
BridalClass2-6ED_174.korean: 그렇기에 리리스 양과 리제 양의 도움을 빌어 주인 앞에 당도했사옵니다.

BridalClass2-6ED_184.english: At first, I thought that it was like a predetermined fate for Black Lilith, the bioroid, to love and protect you, the last human, [username] master.

처음엔 바이오로이드인 리리스가 마지막 인간 님이신 [username]주인님을

BridalClass2-6ED_196.english:

주인님 앞에서 조각난 수영복을 입고 오드리한테 잔소리를 들을 때만 해도…
주인님의 살이 조금만 닿아도 기절해버리는 탓에 실망시켜드렸지만.

"- From the very first day I met Scissors Lise, those times she would bicker with Black Lilith and Sowan…

BridalClass2-6ED_230.korean:
- 처음 리제를 만난 날부터, 리리스, 소완과 아웅다웅하던 모습이…

BridalClass2-6ED_231.english: "- The first glimpse of her expressing her feelings for me was clumsy, but I could feel Scissors Lise's grown-up courage, approaching me now as a proper wife."
BridalClass2-6ED_231.korean:
- 나에 대한 마음을 표현하는 첫 모습은 서툴렀지만,
어느덧 어엿한 아내로서 다가가겠다는 성장한 리제의 용기가 느껴졌다.

BridalClass2-7ED_109.korean:
소첩은 리제 양과 리리스 양뿐만 아니라,
시험에 통과하기 위해 노력했던 오르카의 대원 분들을 모두 지켜보았사옵니다.

BridalClass2-7ED_4.english: I still think that Lady Scissors Lise has problems with the way she is raising the child she is said to have in the future.
BridalClass2-7ED_4.korean: 소첩은 리제 양께서 평가받은 미래의 아이를 양육하는 방식에 여전히 문제가 있다고 생각하옵니다.

BridalClass2-7ED_58.english: The one who was surprisingly suggested first was Miss Black Lilith. ...Just as the master celebrates, we also wanted to create new memories for the master.
BridalClass2-7ED_58.korean:
처음 제안한 건 놀랍게도 리리스 양이었지요.
…주인이 축하를 해주시는 만큼, 저희도 주인께 새로운 추억을 만들어드리고 싶었사옵니다.

BridalClass2-7ED_6.english:
"If you are the winner, then behave with the dignity befitting a winner. 
Is Miss Black Lilith going to remain still over there?
BridalClass2-7ED_6.korean:
우승자면, 우승자답게 체통을 지키시지요.
저기 리리스 양께선 가만히 있지 않사옵니까?

BridalClass2-7ED_66.english: Scissors Lise and Sowan decided to celebrate Black Lilith's final survival pass, but…
BridalClass2-7ED_66.korean: - 리제와 소완, 리리스의 서바이벌 최종 통과를 축하해주기로 했지만…

BridalClass2-7ED_73.english: Scissors Lise, wearing a dress with striking red flower decorations, politely handed over the certificate.
BridalClass2-7ED_73.korean: - 붉은 꽃 장식이 인상적인 드레스를 입은 리제가 공손히 수료증을 내밀었다.

BridalClass2-7ED_75.english: ...Haah, Scissors Lise... I said I would just talk myself!
BridalClass2-7ED_75.korean: …하아, 리제... 그러니까 그냥 내가 말하겠다고 그랬잖아!

BridalClass2-7ED_77.english: Scissors Lise, you dressed up nicely?

BridalClass2-7ED_78.english: After matching Scissors Lise's eye level, who was stuttering, and showing a smile, her face turned even redder, like a boiled lobster.
BridalClass2-7ED_78.korean:
- 말을 더듬는 리제에게 눈높이를 맞춘 뒤,
미소를 지어 보이자, 그녀의 얼굴은 더욱 홍당무처럼 빨개졌다.

BridalClass2-7ED_82.english: Look back on your experiences and memories!! I will teach the master's prospective wives... to be beautiful like Scissors Lise...!!
BridalClass2-7ED_82.korean: 그동안의 경험을 기억을 되짚어!! 주인님의 예비 아내 분들을… 리제처럼 아름답게… 가르칠게요!!

BridalClass2-7ED_84.english:
"- I gently supported Scissors Lise's wobbly waist in front of me and held her,  
and she rubbed her face against my chest, acting spoiled."
BridalClass2-7ED_84.korean:
- 내 앞에서 헤롱거리는 리제의 허리를 부드럽게 받쳐 안자,
그녀는 내 가슴팍에 얼굴을 비비며 어리광을 부렸다.

BridalClass2-7ED_86.english:
"It can't be helped, after all, aren't you the most soft-hearted among us?  
To sort out the situation, why don't you, Miss Black Lilith, speak to the master?"
BridalClass2-7ED_86.korean:
어쩔 수 없지요, 우리 중 제일 마음이 여리지 않사옵니까?
상황을 정리할 겸, 리리스 양께서 주인님께 말씀드리시지요.

BridalClass2-7ED_87.english: Black Lilith, wearing a dress decorated with yellow flowers, looks up at me.
BridalClass2-7ED_87.korean: - 노란 꽃으로 장식된 드레스를 입은 리리스가 나를 올려다본다.

BridalClass2-7ED_94.english: "The good Black Lilith of Master will become an example for Orca and lead everyone to be Master’s perfect wife."
BridalClass2-7ED_94.korean:
주인님의 착한 리리스는 오르카의 모범이 되어
모두를 주인님의 완벽한 아내가 될 수 있도록 이끌겠다고요.

BridalClass2-7ED_96.english: "- I lifted my head and kissed Black Lilith's smooth forehead. Black Lilith's also stood on tiptoe and lightly kissed my lips, then slowly stepped back."
BridalClass2-7ED_96.korean:
- 나는 고개를 들어 리리스의 매끈한 이마에 키스했다.
리리스도 까치발을 들어 내 입술에 가볍게 키스한 후, 천천히 물러섰다.

BridalClass2-7ED_97.english: I feel like telling the stalker to get out of the way, but... Black Lilith, who should set an example, will try to endure it.
BridalClass2-7ED_97.korean:
마음 같아선 스토커한테 저리 좀 비키라 하고 싶지만...
모범을 보여야 할 리리스는 참도록 할게요ㅡ

BridalClass2-8ED_101.english: Then, I like a wife with a kind heart like Scissors Lise.
BridalClass2-8ED_101.korean: 리제의 자식도 리제를 닮아 아주 훌륭한 아이일 거야. 그렇겠지?

BridalClass2-8ED_102.english: I don't want to lose the master's attention to Scissors Lise's child... But love is something you give back as much as you receive. You have to love your child to be a true mother.
BridalClass2-8ED_102.korean:
리제의 아이에게 주인님의 관심을 빼앗기는 건 싫지만…
사랑은 받은 만큼 다시 베푸는 것... 자식을 사랑해야 진정한 엄마예요.

BridalClass2-8ED_103.english: I'm proud of Scissors Lise's growth, to the point where it's not just empty words—she now knows how to properly approach others.
BridalClass2-8ED_103.korean: - 빈말이 아닌, 이젠 타인과도 제법 다가설 줄 알 정도로 성장한 리제의 모습이 뿌듯하다.

BridalClass2-8ED_105.english: Then, Sadius of Retribution, could you watch over Scissors Lise's class for a moment?
BridalClass2-8ED_105.korean: 그럼 사디어스가 잠깐 리제의 수업을 봐줄래?

BridalClass2-8ED_107.english: That's right, buddy. Take this opportunity to learn some proper words and kind words from Scissors Lise. Always with irritation and nagging… huh? Do you know how hurtful it is for the one listening, buddy!
BridalClass2-8ED_107.korean:
맞아 버디. 이참에 리제한테 바른 말 고운 말 좀 배우라고.
맨날 짜증에 핀잔에… 응? 듣는 버디가 얼마나 상처가 되는데!

BridalClass2-8ED_110.english: After patting Sonia of Devastation on the shoulder, I smiled at Scissors Lise and struck a fighting pose.
BridalClass2-8ED_110.korean: - 나는 소니아의 어깨를 툭툭 두드린 후, 리제에게 미소를 지으며, 파이팅 포즈를 취했다.

BridalClass2-8ED_111.english: Scissors Lise looked at me, then quickly smiled happily and waved her hand.
BridalClass2-8ED_111.korean: - 리제는 나를 보더니, 이내 행복한 미소를 지으며, 손을 흔들었다.

BridalClass2-8ED_12.english: After the competition, the bride classes, in which Lise, Sowan, and Black Lilith were brought in as mentors, are said to be gaining sensational popularity at Orca.
BridalClass2-8ED_12.korean: - 대회 이후 리제와 소완, 그리고 리리스가 멘토로 투입된 신부수업은 오르카에서 선풍적인 인기몰이 중이라고 한다.

BridalClass2-8ED_13.english: Do you think Benevolent Leanne is qualified enough to be a wife even if she doesn't have classes?
BridalClass2-8ED_13.korean: 리앤은 수업 같은 거 없어도 충분히 아내의 자격을 갖췄다고 생각하는데?

BridalClass2-8ED_132.english: However, Fotia of Fireside actually turned that weakness into an opportunity and is top-notch when it comes to menus full of smoky flavor.
BridalClass2-8ED_132.korean: 하지만, 포티아는 오히려 그 단점을 기회 삼아 불맛 가득한 메뉴에 있어서는 수준급이지요.

BridalClass2-8ED_142.english: Before I knew it, Sonia of Devastation had changed into comfortable clothes and sat down with a beaming face.
BridalClass2-8ED_142.korean: - 어느새 편한 옷으로 갈아입은 소니아가 싱글벙글한 얼굴로 착석했다.

BridalClass2-8ED_143.english: Won't Sadius of Retribution scold me later… Sonia of Devastation?

BridalClass2-8ED_146.english: Come on, bring the cocktail quickly. Sonia of Devastation, a regular at Cafe Amor, will give a cold-hearted evaluation!
BridalClass2-8ED_146.korean:
자, 어서 칵테일을 가져오라고. 카페 아모르의 단골인 
이 소니아가 냉정하게 평가해 주지!

BridalClass2-8ED_150.english: After answering briefly, I took a sip of the drink Sowan had brought.
BridalClass2-8ED_150.korean: - 나는 짧게 대답한 후, 소완이 가져 온 음료수를 한 모금 마셨다.

BridalClass2-8ED_153.english: You said you Rhode it?! I did nothing…

BridalClass2-8ED_16.english: Oh~ That sounds fun, Watson! Let's go together! Do Sadius of Retribution and Sonia of Devastation want to come along too?
BridalClass2-8ED_16.korean: 오~ 재밌겠다, 왓슨! 같이 가자! 사디어스랑 소니아도 따라올래?

BridalClass2-8ED_164.english: - Before I could even respond, Black Lilith's petite body leapt onto me.
BridalClass2-8ED_164.korean: - 대답하기도 전에, 리리스의 아담한 몸이 내게 뛰어들었다.

BridalClass2-8ED_172.english: After we passed, on the day Master bestowed favor upon us… Miss Scissors Lise fainted on the way, so the two of us attended to Master.
BridalClass2-8ED_172.korean:
저희가 통과한 뒤, 주인님께서 총애를 내리신 날…
리제 양은 도중에 기절한 나머지 저희 둘이서 주인님을 모셨지요.

BridalClass2-8ED_179.english: Miss Scissors Lise. Immediately cut off the connection that has reached into my heart. It is extremely unpleasant.
BridalClass2-8ED_179.korean: 리제 양. 당장 제 마음 안으로 이은 선을 끊어내시지요. 심히 불쾌하옵니다.

BridalClass2-8ED_2.english: Oh, Sadius of Retribution, Sonia of Devastation? And even Benevolent Leanne, what brings you here? I heard you've been busy lately. It's nice to see your faces after a long time.
BridalClass2-8ED_2.korean:
어라, 사디어스, 소니아? 리앤까지 여긴 웬일이야?
요즘 바쁘다고 들었는데? 오랜만에 얼굴 보니 좋네.

BridalClass2-8ED_31.english: Of course... So Black Lilith cleans up her sisters' hair every day?
BridalClass2-8ED_31.korean: 당연하지… 그럼 리리스는 자매들 털을 매일 치우는 거야?

BridalClass2-8ED_33.english:
"- After explaining for quite some time, Black Liliths gave a brief nod with a smile when she saw me and the city guard officers observing.  
When I lightly raised my hand to signal her to continue the lesson, Lilis skillfully carried on with the class."
BridalClass2-8ED_33.korean:
- 한참을 설명하던 리리스는 참관하던 나와 시티가드 대원들을 보자 미소로 짧게 목례했다.
가볍게 손을 들어 수업을 이어가라는 손짓을 보내자, 리리스는 능숙하게 수업을 이어갔다.

BridalClass2-8ED_37.english: If you're embarrassed, you should think about learning and fixing it, Kali. Should I go hard on inspecting the dorm like AA-7 Impet too?
BridalClass2-8ED_37.korean: 부끄러우면 배워서 고칠 생각을 해야지, 칼리야. 나도 임펫처럼 빡세게 숙소 검열 해볼까?

BridalClass2-8ED_5.english: "...Haha, of course, in cases like Sekhmet of Death-unnie or Kohei, we need to discuss and find a compromise to see whether it conflicts with respect for culture or religious beliefs..."
BridalClass2-8ED_5.korean:
…하하, 물론 세크메트 언니나 코헤이 같은 경우는 
문화 존중이나, 종교 신념에 저촉되는지 논의를 통해 타협점을 찾아야 하지만...

BridalClass2-8ED_50.english: ...Changing the child's clothes? Surely you wouldn't commit the heinous act of stripping the Orca child bioroid naked, right?
BridalClass2-8ED_50.korean: …아이 옷 갈아입히기? 설마 오르카 아동 바이오로이드를 벌거벗기는 극악무도한 짓을 하진 않겠지?

BridalClass2-8ED_53.english: Don't worry, Ms. Benevolent Leanne also said it was educational after listening to my explanation.
BridalClass2-8ED_53.korean: 걱정 마세요, 리앤 양께서도 제 설명을 듣곤 교육적이라고 하셨는걸요?

BridalClass2-8ED_55.english: Benevolent Leanne, are you interested? Why don't you give it a listen?

BridalClass2-8ED_57.english: Of course. Benevolent Leanne is also my girlfriend and an excellent future wife, right?
BridalClass2-8ED_57.korean: 물론이지. 리앤도 내 여자친구이자 훌륭한 예비 아내잖아?

BridalClass2-8ED_60.english: I gently patted Benevolent Leanne's shoulder and left the scene.
BridalClass2-8ED_60.korean: - 나는 리앤의 어깨를 부드럽게 토닥이며 현장을 빠져나왔다.

BridalClass2-8ED_68.english: Damn it, this is insane. First the gun broke, and now even the pencil lead I borrowed from T-13 Alvis is broken, what a mess.
BridalClass2-8ED_68.korean: 아이씨 염병. 총도 지랄 맞더니 이젠 알비스한테 빌려 온 샤프심도 부러지고 지랄이네.

BridalClass2-8ED_71.english: It feels like Scissors Lise's blood pressure is going up…

BridalClass2-8ED_74.english: Study? Now that I think about it, I heard that kid slept with her later than Black Lilith and Sowan. Under what circumstances is he teaching us?
BridalClass2-8ED_74.korean:
공부는 무슨. 생각해보니까 쟤는 리리스랑 소완보다 
늦게 동침했다는데 무슨 경우로 우리를 가르쳐?

BridalClass2-8ED_80.english: …Scissors Lise took out the scissors from her back and cut the table in one stroke.
BridalClass2-8ED_80.korean: - …리제는 등 뒤의 가위를 꺼내, 단숨에 탁자를 잘라버렸다.

BridalClass2-8ED_81.english: Did your hand slip? T-19 Pixie. Now, you can see the inside of the broken mechanical pencil very clearly, so there's no need to make a fuss about the pencil lead, right?
BridalClass2-8ED_81.korean: 손이 미끄러졌네? 픽시. 자 이제 고장 난 샤프 내부가 아주 잘 보여서 샤프심 때문에 떠들 필요 없겠다, 그렇지?

BridalClass2-8ED_88.english: …Scissors Lise took out the scissors from her back and cut the table in one stroke.
BridalClass2-8ED_88.korean:
- 사디어스가 헛기침을 하자, 그제야 셋은 뒤를 돌아보았다.
나는 어색한 상황을 바꾸기 위해 세 학생들을 다독였다.

BridalClass2-8ED_89.english:
"Even if Scissors Lise is a little scared, how cultured he is...
You guys will definitely be of great help too."
BridalClass2-8ED_89.korean:
리제가 조금 무서워도 얼마나 교양 있는데...
너희들도 분명 큰 도움이 될 거야.

BridalClass2-8ED_93.english: No, Scissors Lise. It's nice to see that you've grown enough to teach someone else now.
BridalClass2-8ED_93.korean: 아냐 리제. 이젠 다른 사람을 가르쳐 줄 정도로 성장한 모습이 보기 좋아.

BridalClass2-8ED_94.english:
"I... Really, Master? Hehe... Lord, master... So...
Scissors Lise said that she is the best teacher in the bridal lesson... Hehehe... Please praise me..."
BridalClass2-8ED_94.korean:
저… 정말인가요 주인님? 에헤헤… 주, 주인님… 그러니까…
리제가 신부수업을 하는 선생님 중 가장 뛰어나다고… 헤헤헤… 칭찬해 주세요…

BridalClass2-8ED_95.english: Then, I like a wife with a kind heart like Scissors Lise.
BridalClass2-8ED_95.korean: 그럼, 리제 같이 마음이 예쁜 아내가 좋아.

CharLetter_Char_PECS_Mery_N_1_Desc.english: For Valentine's Day, Machina and I tried making various colored chocolate balls. We tried to capture every color Machina and I are capable of... isn't that a bit fascinating? Lately, commissions requesting two-shots with my brother have increased significantly. ...Some members request shots that are awkwardly risqué, but now I'm drawing them with quite the ease of a pro. Come to think of it, I've never actually drawn a proper portrait of my brother. If you have some free time, would you mind stopping by my studio? - My brother's younger sister, Mery
CharLetter_Char_PECS_Mery_N_1_Desc.korean: 발렌타인 데이를 맞아,&n마키나와 함께 여러 색상의 초코볼을 만들어 봤어요.&n저랑 마키나가 구현할 수 있는 모든 색을 담아 보았는데...&n조금 신기하죠?&n&n요즘 오라버니와 투샷을 부탁하는 커미션이 부쩍 늘었어요.&n…어떤 대원 분들은 난감할 정도로 수위가 높은 투샷을 요구하지만,&n이젠 제법 프로처럼 여유롭게 그려내고 있답니다.&n&n그러고 보니, 정작 오라버니의 초상화를 제대로 그린 적은 없었네요.&n시간이 난다면 제 화실에 들려 주시겠어요?&n&n-오라버니의 여동생,&n메리가

DialogJoin_Char_ST_Ullr_N.english: X-02 Ullr, has joined. Hmm… can I let them swarm around with my drones too?
DialogJoin_Char_ST_Ullr_N.korean: X-02 우르, 합류했어. 음… 내 드론들이랑 우르르 몰려다녀도 되지?​

Eternity1ED_19.english: Deconstructor Azaz followed along because he was worried Draculina might get bored.

Eternity1ED_45.english: These are all flowers given for me, aren't they? Thank you to Eternity, Oberonia Rhea, and Aqua, too.
Eternity1ED_45.korean: 다 나를 위해서 주는 꽃이잖아? 이터니티도, 레아도, 아쿠아도 모두 고마워.

Eternity1ED_51.english: Most of the Orca members seem reluctant to talk about what happens after death. I'm curious to know what you think, Oberonia Rhea.
Eternity1ED_51.korean:
오르카 대원분들은 대부분 죽음 이후에 대해 말씀하시길 꺼리시더군요. 
레아 님은 어떻게 생각하시는지 궁금해요.

Eternity1ED_83.english: If you don't mind, why don't you try consulting with Cerestia of Life or Sekhmet of Death about your concerns as well?
Eternity1ED_83.korean: 괜찮으시면 세레스티아 씨나 세크메트 씨께도 고민을 상담해 보시는 건 어떠세요?

Eternity2ED_10.english: I will return after finishing tidying up the flower garden. Hathor of the Heavenly Cow, you go ahead first.
Eternity2ED_10.korean: 저는 꽃밭을 마저 정리한 후 돌아가도록 하겠습니다. 하토르는 먼저 돌아가세요.

Eternity2ED_15.english: Alright, Sekhmet of Death. Well then, I'll be going now! See you later!
Eternity2ED_15.korean: 알았어~ 세크메트. 그럼, 먼저 가볼게! 이따 봐!

Eternity2ED_22.english: That is not the case. Hathor of the Heavenly Cow says that you have been watching the flowers here for the past few days. Is there a reason for this?
Eternity2ED_22.korean: 그건 아닙니다. 하토르의 말로는 요 며칠 전부터 계속 이곳에서 꽃을 지켜보고 계셨다는데 연유가 있으십니까?

Eternity2ED_30.english: Oberonia Rhea said something similar, too. But for me, it is still hard to understand.
Eternity2ED_30.korean: 레아 님도 비슷하게 말씀하셨어요. 하지만 저로서는 여전히 이해하기 힘든 말이에요.

Eternity2ED_31.english: Miss Oberonia Rhea? If you do not mind, could you tell me what the two of you talked about?
Eternity2ED_31.korean: 레아 양께서요? 실례가 되지 않는다면, 두 분이 어떤 이야기를 나누셨는지 들려주실 수 있겠습니까?

Eternity2ED_4.english: Ahaha... I can't seem to hide anything from Sekhmet of Death... Do you even know what kind of flower I gave you?
Eternity2ED_4.korean: 아하하… 세크메트 앞에선 뭘 숨기질 못하겠다니까… 내가 어떤 꽃을 선물했는지도 알고 있어?

Eternity2ED_61.english: Thank you for your kind words, Sekhmet of Death.

Eternity3ED_10.english: That's a relief. But Cerestia of Life, don't you have anything else you're busy with? Is it okay if you help us out?
Eternity3ED_10.korean: 그건 다행이네. 근데 세레스티아는 다른 바쁜 일 없어? 우리 일 도와줘도 되는 거야?

Eternity3ED_11.english: Yes, of course. Ah, but once the compost delivery is finished, I do have to stop by the flower garden I'm tending to with Sekhmet of Death.
Eternity3ED_11.korean: 네, 그럼요. 아, 하지만 퇴비 배달이 끝나면 세크메트와 함께 관리하고 있는 꽃밭에 들리긴 해야 해요.

Eternity3ED_16.english: Oh my, Sekhmet of Death has tidied up the flower garden. Hehe... Well then, shall I try sprouting them this time?
Eternity3ED_16.korean:
어머, 세크메트가 꽃밭을 싹 정리해 뒀군요. 
후후… 그럼, 이번엔 제가 싹을 틔워볼까요?

Eternity3ED_34.english: … But I still don't quite understand Sekhmet of Death's words that life is just as valuable as death.
Eternity3ED_34.korean: ….하지만 삶도 죽음만큼 가치 있다는 세크메트 님의 말씀은 여전히 잘 이해되지 않아요.

Eternity3ED_35.english: Hmm...? Could I hear for a moment what Sekhmet of Death said?
Eternity3ED_35.korean: 으흠~? 세크메트가 무슨 말을 했는지, 잠깐 들어볼 수 있을까요?

Eternity3ED_36.english: … I see. Sekhmet of Death is right.

Eternity3ED_45.english: Am I understanding correctly, Cerestia of Life?
Eternity3ED_45.korean: 제가 이해한 게 맞나요, 세레스티아 님?

Eternity3ED_7.english: … Phew. Alright. If Cerestia of Life says so, I guess it can't be helped.
Eternity3ED_7.korean: …후우. 알았어. 세레스티아가 그렇게 말한다면 어쩔 수 없지.

Eternity3ED_77.english: Yes. I completely understand now. Thank you, Cerestia of Life and Sekhmet of Death.
Eternity3ED_77.korean: 네. 이제 완전히 이해했어요. 세레스티아 님과 세크메트 님께 감사드려요.

Eternity4ED_31.english: Cerestia of Life said that life is an explosion. If we're going to do it anyway, I think it would be better if it exploded rather than just going to explode.
Eternity4ED_31.korean:
세레스티아 님이 그러셨어요. 생명은 폭발이라고요.
기왕이면 터지지 말고 폭발한다면 더 좋을 것 같아요.

Eternity4ED_35.english: Of course, I plan to ask Deconstructor Azaz for that as well. But that is still a long way off.
Eternity4ED_35.korean:
물론, 그것도 아자즈한테 요청할 생각이에요. 
하지만, 아직 먼 후일의 이야기죠.

Eternity4ED_47.english: … Anyway, getting back to the point, these flowers were sent by Cerestia of Life.
Eternity4ED_47.korean: …하여튼 본론으로 돌아가서, 이 꽃들은 세레스티아 님께서 보내신 거예요.

Eternity4ED_53.english: I heard a rough story from Cerestia of Life, but...

Eternity4ED_57.english: I'll ask Deconstructor Azaz to prepare better cushions for the place where the two of you will lie down.
Eternity4ED_57.korean: 두 분이 누울 자리에 더 좋은 쿠션을 준비해달라고 아자즈한테 부탁할게요.

Eternity5ED_13.english: - I once entered Draculina's room at Deconstructor Azaz's invitation. At that time, Eternity greeted me wearing a beautiful outfit.
Eternity5ED_13.korean:
- 언젠가 드라큐리나의 방에 아자즈의 초대로 들어간 적이 있었다.
그때 이터니티는 아름다운 의상을 입고 나를 맞이해주었다.

Eternity5ED_34.english: Would you accept this? It is a rose that Cerestia of Life picked for me herself. And,
Eternity5ED_34.korean: 받아주실래요? 세레스티아 님께서 직접 꺾어주신 장미꽃이에요. 그리고,

Eternity5ED_76.english: "To fulfill Draculina's wish to always live joyfully like a festival, Deconstructor Azaz said he would install a device that sprays crushed tomatoes in Draculina's room."
Eternity5ED_76.korean:
「늘 축제처럼 즐겁게 살고 싶다는 드라큐리나의 소망을 이뤄주기 위해,
아자즈는 으깬 토마토가 분사되는 장치를 드라큐리나의 방에 만든다고 했습니다.」

Eternity5ED_85.english: Did the Audrey Dreamweaver sisters make that dress for you too?
Eternity5ED_85.korean: 그 드레스도 오드리 자매들이 만들어 준 거야?

Ev_Chocolate_BR_Cheona_Desc.english: This is handmade chocolate made by CheonA herself.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_18.english: My name is Vargr. This is the Commander. What is your name?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_18.korean: 내 이름은 바르그다. 이쪽은 사령관님이시다.&n너는 이름은 뭐지?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_57.english: I'm not really sure about that either. Anyway, good job, Vargr.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_57.korean: 그건 나도 잘 모르겠어. 일단 수고했어, 바르그.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_66.english: What does Vargr think of that kid named Haru?
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_66.korean: 바르그는 저 하루라는 애를 어떻게 생각해?

LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_9.english: - The progression of the story may change from before due to Vargr's intervention.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2ED_9.korean: - 바르그의 개입으로 이야기의 진행이 이전과 달라질 수도 있다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_44.english: Alright then, I'll get going. I'll pray you clear it safely this time. You have fun too, Vargr.
LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_44.korean: 자, 그럼 이제 작동할게. 이번에는 무사히 클리어하길 기도할게.&n바르그 언니도 재밌게 즐기고 와.

LastCorruptedRecord1-2OP_85.english: Let's take care of the IronBug first, Vargr.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_115.english: Mr. Vargr, and others I met for the first time today—I wonder why you are treating me so kindly…
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_115.korean: 바르그 씨도 그렇고 오늘 처음 본 사람들인데 왜 이렇게 친절하게 대해주시는지…

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_100.english: Mr. Vargr… you are really strong…

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_39.english: And I really want to thank Mr. Vargr and the Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_39.korean: 그리고 바르그 씨랑 사령관님께… 정말 감사드리고 싶어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_44.english: However, as I met the Commander and Mr. Vargr and talked with the people here, that thought gradually changed.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_44.korean: 그런데 사령관님과 바르그 씨를 만나고 이곳 사람들과 함께 얘기하면서 그 생각이 조금씩 바뀌었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_74.english: However, training here with Mr. Vargr, and talking with the Commander and the camp people... I think I've gained a little more composure.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_74.korean: 하지만 여기서 바르그 씨와 함께 훈련하고, 사령관님 그리고 캠프 사람들과 함께 이야기하면서...&n조금 여유가 생긴 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_79.english: Mr. Vargr… Mr. Vargr… did you also… lose a precious family member?
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_79.korean: 바르그 씨는…&n바르그 씨도… 소중한 가족을 잃으셨나요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_81.english: Mr. Vargr, you looked sad whenever I talked about my family. If not, I'm sorry... I might have misunderstood.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_81.korean: 제가 가족 이야기를 할 때마다 바르그 씨는 슬퍼 보이셨어요.&n아니라면 죄송해요… 제가 괜히 오해한 걸지도 몰라요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_31.english: After coming here… meeting many people, talking with Mr. Vargr… I came to know.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_31.korean: 이곳에 와서… 많은 사람들을 만나고, 바르그 씨와 대화하고… 알게 됐어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_44.english: After learning swordsmanship from Mr. Vargr and becoming stronger…
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_44.korean: 바르그 씨에게 검술을 배우고, 좀 더 강해져서…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_10.english: It is better to waste your time than to suffer a loss.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_10.korean: 피해를 보는 것보단 허탕을 치는 게 나아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_13.english: Both of you, please calm down. This isn't the time to fight, is it?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_13.korean: 두 사람 다 진정하세요.&n지금은 싸울 때가 아니잖아요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_15.english: Haha, that's true. It seems like you two are in good sync now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_15.korean: 후후, 그렇네요. 이제는 호흡이 잘 맞으시는 것 같네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_16.english: Okay! Then let's do this! First, we'll check if there are any other competitors.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_16.korean: 좋아! 그럼 이렇게 하자!&n먼저 다른 경쟁자가 있는지부터 확인하는 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_17.english: If there are no competitors, I will proceed safely as you suggested.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_17.korean: 만약 경쟁자가 없다면 네 말대로 안전한 방법으로 진행할게.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_18.english: But if there is a competitor, I'll move quickly using the method I've decided on. How about that?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_18.korean: 하지만 경쟁자가 있다면, 내가 정한 방법대로 빠르게 움직이는 거야. 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_19.english: … Alright. Instead, in that case, we will do it with just you, me, and a small elite group.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_19.korean: …알았어.&n대신 그 경우에는 너와 나, 그리고 소수 정예 인원으로만 한다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_20.english: There won't be a huge gain, but you can reduce the risk.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_20.korean: 큰 이득은 없겠지만 위험은 줄일 수 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_21.english: Well, if that's the case, I'll let you in.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_22.english: I can't believe the word 'compromise' is coming out of your mouth.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_25.english: Yes, sometimes it’s not bad to just watch like this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_25.korean: 네, 가끔은 이렇게 지켜보는 것도 나쁘지 않네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_26.english: Iris looks much brighter than before, too.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_26.korean: 이리스 양도 전보다 훨씬 밝아 보이고요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_28.english: How long are you going to stay like that? Surely… you don't actually like looking like that, do you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_28.korean: 언제까지 그 모습으로 계실 건가요?&n설마… 그 모습이 마음에 드신 건 아니죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_29.english: Hey kid! Let's go! I can't stay in a place like this any longer!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_29.korean: 꼬맹이! 어서 가자! 더는 이런 곳이 못 있겠다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_30.english: Hehehe... With this, a funny line will be added to my 'real notebook'.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_30.korean: 우후후… 이걸로 제 '진짜 수첩'에 재미있는 한 줄이 추가되겠네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_32.english: … Hmm, this is quite strange. This wasn't the ending I wanted.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_32.korean: …흐음 이거 참 이상한 일이군요.&n제가 원하던 결말은 이게 아니었는데 말이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_34.english: I don't know what trick they used, but I never imagined they would approach Yuma in the form of a child.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_34.korean: 무슨 수를 쓴 건지 모르겠지만, 설마 어린아이의 모습으로 유마 씨에게 접근할 줄은 몰랐습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_36.english: Originally, more Soul Junk should have swarmed in when Mr. Nev was isolated in the department store.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_36.korean: 원래라면 백화점에서 네브 씨를 고립시켰을 때 더 많은 소울정크가 몰려들었어야 했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_37.english: I must be the only one who can control Soul Junk in this void…
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_37.korean: 이 공백 안에서 소울정크를 조종할 수 있는 건 저뿐일 텐데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_38.english: It seems like someone is interfering with me... no, helping you, Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_38.korean: 마치 누군가가 저의 방해를… 아니, 사령관 씨를 도와주고 있는 것 같군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_42.english: Player: Commander &nCharacter: Iris Yuma &nEnding Branch: Achieved.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_42.korean: 플레이어 : 사령관&n인물 : 이리스 유마&n엔딩 분기 : 달성 완료.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_43.english: Permission to view the following records.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_5.english: Ha! This is so frustrating! Why can't you understand what I'm saying!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_5.korean: 하! 답답하네! 왜 이렇게 말귀를 못 알아듣는 거야!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_52.english: Check the restrictions on permissions that can be controlled within the game.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_52.korean: 게임 내 제어할 수 있는 권한의 제한을 확인.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_53.english: Start collecting clear data for the fifth record.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_53.korean: 다섯 번 째 기록의 클리어 데이터 수집을 시작합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_54.english: Commander, there is not much I can do to help you now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_54.korean: 사령관님, 이제 제가 도와드릴 수 있는 일은 많지 않습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_55.english: <Iris Yuma: The Unleashed Hammer of Wrath> END.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_6.english: I told you you have to go in like this!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_6.korean: 그러니까 여긴 이렇게 들어가야 한다고 했잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_7.english: That way, the risk of failure is high.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_8.english: Even if it takes time, it is the right way to proceed.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_8.korean: 시간이 걸리더라도 이쪽으로 진행하는 게 맞아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_9.english: What are you going to do if you wait that long and end up wasting your time? It's much better to just get it done quickly!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_9.korean: 그 시간을 기다리다 허탕만 치면 어떡할 건데?&n그럴 바엔 빠르게 진행하는 게 훨씬 낫지!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_1.english: For one, it probably isn't a lie.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_10.english: But after losing the rod, I just became a scared loser. Now, I have no intention of making the camp strong and am just barely surviving.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_10.korean: 하지만 로드를 잃은 후엔 그냥 겁먹은 찌질이가 되어버렸습니다.&n이제는 캠프를 강하게 만들 생각도 없이 그저 연명만 하고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_104.english: … I’ll keep it. But don’t get me wrong! I’m taking it because it’s a waste to throw it away!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_104.korean: …받아둘게.&n근데 오해하지 마! 버리긴 아까우니까 받는 거라고!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_107.english: - Anyway... there's no way it could have been this smooth.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_107.korean: - 그건 그렇고… 이렇게까지 순조로울 리 없을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_109.english: - Huh? Just now, surely...? A vibration?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_11.english: It got even worse, especially after Yuma left. It was like I didn't even know what I was living for day after day.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_11.korean: 특히 유마 씨가 떠난 뒤로는 더 심해졌습니다.&n하루하루 대체 뭘 위해 사는지도 모르는 사람처럼 말이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_110.english: Did you hear that sound just now?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_111.english: A vibration from somewhere… Ah, the wall is shaking!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_112.english: Damn it, as expected, they won't just let it slide!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_114.english: I know! I have no intention of lingering here right now! Get everything ready! We're getting out of here fast!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_114.korean: 나도 알아! 지금 여기서 물고 늘어질 생각은 없어!&n전부 준비해! 빠르게 여기를 빠져 나간다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_115.english: Don't scatter, gather! First, to where Tenebris is—
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_115.korean: 흩어지지 말고 집결해! 일단 테네브리스가 있는 곳으로ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_116.english: Oh no, Miss Iris! It's dangerous!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_119.english: The floor is about to collapse too!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_12.english: In that regard, I think Yuma has the qualities to become a true leader.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_12.korean: 그런 점에 있어서 유마 씨야말로 진정한 리더가 될 자질이 있다고 생각합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_122.english: Iris, if you want to play outside again, behave yourself like your older sisters.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_122.korean: 이리스, 또 밖에서 놀고 싶다면 언니들처럼 얌전히 있으렴.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_123.english: But... my friends are waiting right now...

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_124.english: You're not a child anymore. How long do you plan to keep acting like a spoiled brat?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_124.korean: 너도 이제 어린애가 아니잖니. 언제까지 그렇게 어리광만 부릴 셈이니?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_126.english: Just try bothering my friend one more time! If you do, I'll really kill you!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_126.korean: 한 번만 더 내 친구 괴롭히기만 해 봐!&n그땐 정말 죽여버린다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_127.english: I get it, I'm telling you, I get it!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_129.english: Where on earth did you learn such a nasty trick!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_129.korean: 이런 못돼먹은 짓거리는 대체 어디서 배운 거니!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_13.english: Hmm? I thought you were sticking close to Tenebris because you were also influenced by Lord's doctrine of salvation.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_13.korean: 흐음?&n너도 로드의 구원론에 감화돼서 테네브리스 옆에 붙어 있는 줄 알았는데.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_131.english: I don't even expect you to act demure like the other older sisters. But I absolutely cannot tolerate your attitude that tarnishes the Yuma family!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_131.korean: 다른 언니들처럼 조신하게 굴라는 건 바라지도 않아.&n하지만 유마 가문에 먹칠하는 네 태도는 도저히 용납할 수 없구나!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_132.english: What did I do so wrong!? Is protecting a friend a mistake!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_132.korean: 제가 뭘 그렇게 잘못했냐구요!? 친구를 지킨 게 잘못이에요!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_133.english: You are forbidden from going out until you reflect on your actions.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_137.english: Breaking news. Today, a female student committed suicide at a high school.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_137.korean: 속보입니다. 오늘 한 고등학교에서 여학생이 자살하는 사건이 있었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_138.english: According to rumors, the student in question continuously bullied and assaulted students from the same school…
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_138.korean: 소문에 의하면, 해당 학생은 같은 학교 학생들에게 지속적으로 괴롭힘과 폭행을…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_139.english: Damn it… Damn it, damn it, damn it!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_14.english: Well, in the end, I just realized that Mr. Tenebris is nothing but a frail human.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_14.korean: 뭐, 결국 테네브리스 씨도 한낱 연약한 인간이란 걸 알게 되었을 뿐이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_140.english: I didn't do anything wrong! I didn't make a mistake!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_142.english: What good is there in listening to adults?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_142.korean: 어른들 말 들어서 좋을 게 뭐가 있어…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_143.english: In the end, the only one you can trust is yourself.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_143.korean: 결국 마지막에 믿을 수 있는 건 자기 자신뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_144.english: Please evacuate to a power shelter! I repeat, please evacuate to a power shelter!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_144.korean: 전원 쉘터로 피난해 주십시오! 반복합니다, 전원 쉘터로 피난해 주십시오!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_146.english: Please evacuate to the power shelter! A gap will occur!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_146.korean: 전원 쉘터로 피난해 주십시오! 공백이 발생합니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_148.english: Ah, no... Mother! Father! Sister!! Aaaah! What have I been holding back all this time for!!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_148.korean: 아, 아니야… 어머니! 아버지! 언니!!&n으아아아아! 내가 뭐 때문에 지금까지 참고 살았는데!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_149.english: How can something just vanish so meaninglessly!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_149.korean: 이렇게 허무하게 사라져 버리는 게 어딨어!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_15.english: So, I hope Ms. Iris takes over this department store and solidifies her position. Then, Mr. Tenebris will surely hand over the leadership position.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_15.korean: 그러니 전 이리스 씨가 이번 백화점을 독차지해 입지를 확고히 했으면 좋겠습니다.&n그러면 테네브리스 씨도 순순히 리더의 자리를 물려주겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_150.english: I wanted to show… that I wasn't wrong…!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_150.korean: 내가 틀리지 않았다는 걸… 보여주고 싶었는데…!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_151.english: Please evacuate to the power shelter! A gap will occur! Repeat—
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_151.korean: 전원 쉘터로 피난해 주십시오! 공백이 발생합니다! 반복합니다ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_156.english: It's okay, it's no big deal. … What about the others?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_157.english: All of our members are safe. For some reason, we have completely split off from the other side.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_157.korean: 저희 멤버는 다들 무사합니다.&n무슨 우연인지 저쪽과는 완전히 갈라져 버렸습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_158.english: It seems like most of the Soul Junk have also swarmed toward Tenebris.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_158.korean: 대부분의 소울정크도 테네브리스 쪽으로 몰려간 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_159.english: Ms. Iris, this is our chance! We've already packed plenty of supplies. Let's leave right now!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_159.korean: 이리스 씨, 이건 기회입니다! 물자는 이미 충분히 챙겼습니다.&n이대로 바로 여길 떠나죠!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_16.english: Don't get the wrong idea. I have no intention of accepting the position that bastard hands down, nor do I intend to go back to Grass Blanket Camp.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_16.korean: 착각하지 마. 난 그 자식이 물려주는 자리를 받을 생각도, 잔디이불 캠프에 다시 들어갈 생각도 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_160.english: What? What about the guys up there?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_161.english: Aren't they the ones who tried to kill us anyway? They might have intended to sacrifice us again this time!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_161.korean: 어차피 우리를 죽이려 했던 자들 아닙니까?&n이번에도 우리를 희생시킬 생각이었을지도 모릅니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_162.english: It must just be that some misunderstanding caused our positions to switch. Otherwise, we would have originally been the ones fighting Soul Junk over there.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_162.korean: 뭔가 착오가 생겨 입장이 바뀐 것뿐이겠죠.&n그렇지 않다면 저쪽에서 소울정크와 맞서고 있는 게 원래는 우리였을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_163.english: Hahaha! Serves you right! You brought it upon yourself!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_164.english: … That’s right… Heave-ho… Then, let’s hurry—

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_165.english: Ah, Iris. You dropped something. Is this… a teddy bear? … It's quite torn.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_165.korean: 아, 이리스 씨. 무언가 떨어뜨리셨습니다.&n이건… 곰인형? …상당히 찢어졌군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_17.english: … But if I were taking it by force in a legitimate way, that would be a different story.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_17.korean: …하지만 내가 정당하게 힘으로 빼앗는 거라면 얘기가 다르지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_171.english: Do you think I'm an adult?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_172.english: Of course! Isn't Ms. Iris someone who takes full responsibility for her decisions to the very end?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_172.korean: 그야 당연하죠!&n이리스 씨는 자신이 정한 일에 끝까지 책임을 지시는 분 아닙니까!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_175.english: In that case… it can’t be helped. I guess I’ll have to take responsibility like an adult.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_175.korean: 그렇다면… 어쩔 수 없지.&n어른답게, 책임을 져야겠네.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_176.english: Mr. Tenebris! This is a big problem. The path down is completely blocked!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_176.korean: 테네브리스 씨! 큰일입니다.&n밑으로 내려가는 길이 완전히 막혔습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_177.english: Soul Junk keeps swarming in! That giant thing is completely impervious to attacks!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_177.korean: 소울정크가 계속 몰려오고 있어요! 저 거대한 녀석, 공격이 전혀 통하지 않습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_178.english: Everyone, step back! You must not fall!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_178.korean: 모두 제 뒤로 물러서세요! 떨어지면 안 됩니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_179.english: What happened to the collapsed floor?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_18.english: That's right! Exactly! That's exactly what I wanted to say!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_18.korean: 맞습니다! 바로 그거예요!&n제가 말씀드리고 싶은 게 딱 그겁니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_180.english: You're wrong! That side is completely blocked too!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_182.english: I don't know! … Even if they are safe, they would have already run away! Because they are selfish guys!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_182.korean: 모르겠습니다! …무사하다 해도 이미 도망쳤을 겁니다!&n자기밖에 모르는 녀석들이니까요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_186.english: - The situation is the worst. That giant Soul Junk, in particular, has thick armor.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_186.korean: - 상황은 최악이다. 특히 저 거대한 소울정크는 장갑이 두터워.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_19.english: Well, fine. Regardless of your opinion, there's no harm in looting the supplies anyway.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_19.korean: 뭐, 좋아.&n네 생각이 어쨌든 어차피 물자를 털어서 나쁠 건 없으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_190.english: Step back! I need emergency treatment!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_191.english: Mr. Tenebris! We must get out of here first! We will all be wiped out here!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_191.korean: 테네브리스 씨! 일단 이곳을 벗어나야 합니다!&n여기선 전멸합니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_198.english: I am the one who brought everyone here.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_199.english: As a leader, I will take responsibility... and bring everyone back safely.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_2.english: There are rumors circulating that another department store has appeared. Since no one has gone in yet, supplies must be plentiful.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_2.korean: 안 그래도 백화점이 또 하나 나타났다는 소문이 돌고 있습니다.&n아직 들어간 사람도 없으니 물자도 넉넉하겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_20.english: But… Tenebris must already know the news, right?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_20.korean: 그런데… 테네브리스는 이미 그 소식을 알고 있겠지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_200.english: I'm not sure if we're included in that 'all'.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_202.english: The self-proclaimed strongest Soulworker... is kneeling and bleeding? With that, do you have the right to talk about responsibility and justice?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_202.korean: 자칭 최강의 소울워커 님께서… 무릎 꿇고 피를 흘리고 있네?&n그래서야 책임이니 정의니 떠들 자격이 있겠어?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_204.english: Why or not! I just came to exercise my responsibility!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_204.korean: 어째서고 뭐고! 나도 책임이란 걸 행사하러 왔을 뿐이야!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_206.english: This is just a temporary alliance this time! And just so you know, I haven't forgiven you yet, Tenebris!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_206.korean: 이번만 임시 동맹이야!&n참고로 난 아직 널 용서한 게 아니니까 테네브리스!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_208.english: You... don't get in the way... get out of here!!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_209.english: That's amazing. Soul Junk, who hadn't budged from any attack, has fallen.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_209.korean: 굉장해요.&n어떤 공격에도 꿈쩍도 하지 않았던 소울정크가 쓰러졌어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_21.english: Given the scale, it must have been conveyed. But that indecisive person wouldn't move right away.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_21.korean: 이 정도 규모면 전해졌을 겁니다.&n하지만 우유부단한 그 사람이 바로 움직일 리는 없겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_210.english: Alright, let's give it a try!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_22.english: Ms. Iris, shall we leave right away then?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_23.english: Yeah, gather the troops quickly. If we move now, we'll have the advantage.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_23.korean: 응, 인원을 빠르게 모아. 지금 움직이면 우리가 유리해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_25.english: I have absolutely no talent for fighting. It would be enough if you just included me in the group after you return.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_25.korean: 저는 싸움은 영 소질이 없어서요.&n다녀오신 뒤, 저를 그룹에 끼워만 주신다면 충분합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_26.english: If they want to join, I’ll let them in. I don’t turn away people who come.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_28.english: - Kent… I knew you were plotting something behind the scenes, but…
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_28.korean: - 켄트… 뒤에서 뭔가를 꾸미고 있다는 건 알고 있었지만…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_3.english: Ah, right. Let's assume that's true for now. But why are they coming to tell us?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_3.korean: 아, 그래.&n우선 그 말이 사실이라 치자. 근데 그걸 왜 우리한테 와서 말하는데?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_30.english: Oh? So there was a cute little kid in a place like this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_30.korean: 어라? 이런 곳에 귀여운 꼬마가 있었군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_31.english: Hmm... that's quite fascinating. It looks like a face I've seen somewhere before... It's like someone I know just got younger.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_31.korean: 흐음… 참 신기하군요.&n어디서 많이 본 얼굴인데… 마치 제가 아는 분이 어려진 것 같달까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_32.english: Kent. Stay away from that kid.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_33.english: If you lay even a hand on it, I won't let you get away with it.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_35.english: Anyway… hmm… I see… I see.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_36.english: I never dreamed Yuma-san had this kind of taste—
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_36.korean: 유마 씨가 이런 취향일 줄은 꿈에도ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_37.english: I don't mind at all if you pretend this never happened.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_37.korean: 지금 얘기 없었던 일로 해도 나는 전혀 상관없는데?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_38.english: Ahaha, that's scary. Then I'll take my leave.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_38.korean: 아하하, 무섭군요. 그럼 전 여기서 물러나겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_39.english: He's still a guy whose true intentions are impossible to read...
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_39.korean: 여전히 속내를 알 수 없는 놈이야…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_4.english: If you're Tenebris's lackey, it would be perfect to just go and tell that guy.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_4.korean: 테네브리스 따까리라면 그냥 그 자식한테 가서 말하면 딱 좋잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_40.english: ...So that's how it turned out. Little kid.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_41.english: Keep a close watch on this place while I'm gone.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_41.korean: 내가 없는 동안 여기 잘 지키고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_42.english: Look at this! You were crying "Waaah!" the first time I saw you, and now you're acting all tough.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_42.korean: 요거 봐라?&n처음 봤을 때는 후에에엥~하고 울었던 주제에 늠름해진 척이나 하고 말이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_43.english: Hmph, I'm not afraid of anything. It's just that I'm worried about what to do when I see that guy's face again.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_43.korean: 흥, 난 무서운 게 없거든.&n단지, 싫은 녀석의 면상을 다시 봤을 때 어떻게 해야 할지 고민이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_44.english: I’d love to smash my fist in that face, but!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_44.korean: 마음 같아서는 그 면상에 주먹을 박아버리고 싶지만!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_45.english: What's with the sudden change? How embarrassing...

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_46.english: Yeah, that's what I plan to do this time too.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_47.english: I won't make the wrong choice again.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_47.korean: 이젠 두 번 다시 틀린 선택을 하지 않을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_50.english: - ...This should be fine. I don't get the feeling that Iris's mental state is under any pressure either.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_50.korean: - ...이걸로 괜찮겠지. 이리스의 정신 상태도 몰려있다는 느낌은 아니야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_52.english: - Then… alright, let me join Shirayuri.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_54.english: I came to corner Yuma once again, but I didn't expect to find something so interesting.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_54.korean: 다시 한번 유마 씨를 몰아세우기 위해 찾아왔는데&n아주 흥미로운 걸 찾을 줄은 몰랐군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_57.english: As expected, you were aiming for this place too.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_58.english: Why? Are you that upset that I came?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_58.korean: 왜? 내가 온 게 그렇게 언짢아? ?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_59.english: Aren't you disappointed that things went awry when you were planning to have it all to yourself?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_59.korean: 독차지할 생각이었는데 틀어져서 아쉬운 거 아니야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_6.english: Well, you see, I haven't actually said anything, but I really haven't been happy with Mr. Tenebris's behavior lately.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_6.korean: 뭐, 그게 말이죠.&n사실 말은 안 했지만, 요즘 테네브리스 씨의 행동이 영 못마땅해서요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_60.english: If you intend to fight, stop it. You can't beat me with your own strength.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_60.korean: 싸울 생각이라면 그만 둬.&n네 힘으로는 날 이길 수 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_61.english: If you attack us, I won't stay quiet anymore.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_61.korean: 우리를 공격한다면 나도 더는 가만히 있지 않을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_62.english: Ha! Here comes the great apostle of justice? You kept harping on about justice, justice, and now you're saying you'll just overpower them with force?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_62.korean: 하! 대단한 정의의 사도 납셨네?&n그렇게 정의, 정의 떠들더니 결국 힘으로 제압하겠다는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_63.english: … There probably isn't any need for further conversation.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_64.english: Yeah, I have no intention of talking to you anymore, either.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_64.korean: 그래, 나도 이제 너랑 말 섞을 생각 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_65.english: Both of you, stop! Do you intend to fight right here!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_65.korean: 두 분 다 멈추세요! 지금 여기서 싸울 생각이신가요!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_66.english: Get out of the way, Shirayuri. I haven't forgotten how hard you hit me!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_66.korean: 비켜, 시라유리.&n네가 힘껏 때린 것도 아직 안 잊었다고!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_67.english: Miss Iris, I know how you feel right now. But you can fight later. If you fight now, you will lose both supplies and people.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_67.korean: 이리스 양, 당신이 지금 어떤 기분인지는 알아요.&n하지만 싸우는 건 나중에도 할 수 있어요. 지금 싸우면 물자도, 사람도 모두 다 잃습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_68.english: How do you know how I feel—!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_7.english: After all that flirting all this time, you suddenly show up and expect me to believe it now?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_7.korean: 지금껏 그렇게 꼬리쳐놓고 갑자기 찾아 와서는 그걸 지금 믿으라고?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_70.korean: 꼬맹이, 네가 여기에 왜 있는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_71.english: Where did the guy who confidently told me to leave it to him go, chasing me all the way here!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_71.korean: 자신 있게 맡겨달라던 녀석은 어딜 가고 여기까지 쫓아와!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_72.english: Hehe, since the child is saying all this... how about we let this pass peacefully just this once?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_72.korean: 후후, 아이가 이렇게까지 말하는데… 이번만은 평화롭게 넘어가면 어떨까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_73.english: Ah! Really! Alright! We can just let it slide this time!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_73.korean: 아아! 정말! 알았어! 이번엔 조용히 넘어가면 되잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_74.english: Hey kid! Go back and see! Stick right by my side and never let go!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_74.korean: 꼬맹이! 너 돌아가서 봐!&n내 옆에 딱 붙어서 절대 떨어지지 말고!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_8.english: I thought Mr. Tenebris was ambitious.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_81.english: Ms. Iris! There is a box here too!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_82.english: There is plenty of food and medicine left, too!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_84.english: You never know. A Soul Junk might suddenly pop out like back then.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_84.korean: 그건 모르는 일이지. 그때처럼 갑자기 소울정크가 튀어나올지도 모르잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_85.english: As expected, you still have it in your heart.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_87.english: Can't you trust Mr. Tenebris just a little?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_87.korean: 조금만 테네브리스 씨를 믿어주실 수는 없는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_89.english: Then, why don't you trust me?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_9.english: I thought I could gather Desire Walkers, increase the camp's power under the pretext of 'salvation,' and dominate the void.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_9.korean: 데자이어 워커를 모으고, '구원'을 명분으로 캠프의 전력을 늘려 공백을 지배할 줄 알았죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_90.english: What on earth is this nonsense? I'm talking about you... You haven't forgotten how hard you hit me with that hand, have you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_90.korean: 이건 또 무슨 소리래?&n너 말이야... 그 손으로 날 힘껏 때린 걸 잊은 건 아니지?
